work_summary: Merged PR #7 and PR #8 into main, confirmed main CI success and CD failure caused by missing BACKEND_REMOTE_ENV_FILE, opened PR #9 to turn that backend CD hard failure into warning-plus-skip behavior, and captured the remaining merge-readiness issue on Koyeb CLI install ordering.
priority_actions: Move the Koyeb CLI install step behind the backend deploy config gate in PR #9.
Decide whether to merge PR #9 before or after setting Production GitHub environment secrets and variables.
Re-run CD on main after merging PR #9 or once BACKEND_REMOTE_ENV_FILE is configured.
Restore or triage the remaining stash entries only when handoff-artifact cleanup is back in scope.
context_for_next_agent: main is already updated with PR #7 and PR #8 at commit 360b6d4. PR #9 is open from fix/cd-skip-missing-backend-config and contains commit c54893a. The current local worktree also has a generated diff in frontend/next-env.d.ts and an untracked .claude/plans/landing-page-redesign-gov.md file that should not be mixed into the workflow fix. Remaining stash entries are stash@{0} temp handoff artifacts before cd skip fix, stash@{1} pre-merge handoff artifacts and claude plan drift, and stash@{2} local-only notes and generated files.

cross_platform_read.key_insight: Live-chat hardening is complete and only manual QA remains.
main already had a green CI baseline after the pipeline repair.
Cross-platform handoff and SESSION_INDEX rules are still the governing workflow contract.
Historical live-chat UI component migration context remains available if frontend chat work resumes.

commits.message: main includes merged PR #7 and PR #8
fix(cd): skip backend path when env secret is missing

verification: GitHub Actions status on main: CI success, CD failure due to missing BACKEND_REMOTE_ENV_FILE
